overall.description: A third-person perspective walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at dusk, featuring futuristic architecture, neon holographic advertisements, and heavy vehicle traffic. The character navigates busy sidewalks and crosses a wide intersection filled with futuristic vehicles in a high-fidelity game engine environment reminiscent of Cyberpunk 2077.

events.description: pedestrian with glowing umbrella passes in front of camera view
futuristic police vehicles visible parked along the left sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, navigating past pedestrians with glowing umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person with glowing orange umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk
futuristic police car parked along the curb with emergency lights

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective glass facade running along the sidewalk
futuristic walkway bridge connecting buildings overhead with metal supports
large holographic advertisement display showing a human figure on building facade
rain-soaked pavement reflecting neon lights and street lamps

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a walk along a rain-soaked sidewalk between a tall glass office tower on the left and a busy multi-lane street on the right. Elevated pedestrian bridges span overhead between buildings. The camera follows the character past pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas and parked police vehicles, with large digital billboards visible across the street. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with mixed natural dusk lighting and artificial neon illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with holographic advertising towers

events.description: character steps off sidewalk onto yellow and black striped crosswalk markings
multiple futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection in both directions

agents.ego_description: navigating across the wide multi-lane intersection, timing movement with traffic flow

notable_agents.action: woman with red umbrella crossing the street in the same direction
blue futuristic sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall building wrapped in colorful neon light rings in pink, blue, and green
wide pedestrian crossing with bold diagonal yellow and black safety stripes
white cylindrical building with horizontal parking levels visible

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide, neon-lit intersection marked by bold yellow and black crosswalk stripes. A distinctive cylindrical tower wrapped in colorful neon rings dominates the right side of the view. Heavy traffic flows through the intersection with various futuristic vehicles passing by. The camera moves steadily across the wet asphalt, reflecting the vibrant neon lights from surrounding advertisements and street signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with street-level shops and parked vehicles

events.description: character reaches the opposite sidewalk and continues along the building front
slight turn to follow the sidewalk curve while passing pedestrians

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk on the opposite side of the street, passing groups of pedestrians and street vendors

notable_agents.action: group of people standing near a building entrance with purple neon lighting
child in yellow jacket running ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: row of parked cars including a black sedan and orange utility vehicle
commercial entrance with purple neon lighting and people gathered outside
small kiosk or stall with bright lighting near the building facade

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character continues along the opposite sidewalk, passing a curved parking garage structure on the right. The sidewalk features street vendor stalls and building entrances with purple neon lighting. Various pedestrians walk in opposing directions, including a child in a yellow jacket running ahead. Parked futuristic vehicles line the curb while sparse traffic continues to move along the wet street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district, transitioning from a narrow corridor of glass towers into a wide, neon-drenched intersection and finally toward a bustling commercial sidewalk. It begins with a walk along a wet pavement flanked by a towering office building and a busy street, passing pedestrians with glowing umbrellas beneath elevated pedestrian bridges. As the character reaches the road, the scene opens into a vast intersection where the camera glides across reflective asphalt and yellow crosswalk stripes, dominated by a cylindrical tower wrapped in vibrant neon rings. The movement then shifts across the street to the opposite sidewalk, passing a curved parking garage and purple-lit building entrances. Finally, the camera follows the path past street vendor stalls and a child in a yellow jacket, moving deeper into the city's artificial glow.
